description: Case style: Analogue watch, has a circular case that is embellished with stones along the periphery, stainless steel backDial style: Light brown dial with pattern detail, has gold toned markings, gold toned hour and minute hands with glow-in-the-dark inlay, gold toned seconds hand, branding below the 12 hour markFeatures: Screw to reset timeStrap style: Steel and gold toned, bracelet style strap, secured with a butterfly claspWater resistantComes in a signature Timex caseWarranty: 1 year against manufacturing defects
